chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-488 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A 344/19 15.01.2019 Petitioner present in person. -.-.-. Urgency granted. Petitioner present in person does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
